execution: Direct via Shopify Admin MCP (graphql_mutation metafieldsSet) — bypasses scripts/seo-backfill-product-seo.mjs because the GitHub Actions run failed with exit 1 (likely stale SHOPIFY_ADMIN_TOKEN secret after the rotation, since the env-check is the only exit path that produces no FATAL log line). Identical template logic to the script's Phase 290 rewrite: seo.title = product.title (no truncation, no suffix); seo.description = {vendor if not in title} + title + brand suffix, capped at 160 chars.

verification_samples.seo_description_after: Rize Home Restara at LA Mattress Store in Los Angeles. Free white-glove delivery, 120-night comfort exchange, 0% APR financing.

verification_samples.seo_title_after: Diamond Dreamstage 2.0 Collection Clarity Medium Cool Copper Gel Memory Foam 13" Mattress
verification_samples.seo_description_after_truncated: Diamond Dreamstage 2.0 Collection Clarity Medium Cool Copper Gel Memory Foam 13" Mattress at LA Mattress Store in Los Angeles. Free white-glove delivery, 120...

verification_samples.seo_title_after: Sleep & Beyond Organic Cotton Sateen Sheet Set
verification_samples.seo_description_after: Sleep & Beyond Organic Cotton Sateen Sheet Set at LA Mattress Store in Los Angeles. Free white-glove delivery, 120-night comfort exchange, 0% APR financing.

notes: Of 230 active+published products audited, 69 had null seo.title AND null seo.description. The remaining 161 were skipped (had merchant or earlier-script values already, including ~35 with the older truncated `… in Los Angeles · LA Mattress` template that the Phase 290 rewrite was meant to replace — those are not in scope for this empty-fill backfill but should be addressed in a follow-up sweep to fix the SEMrush duplicate-title-tag flag).
